nasb.text: His hands are rods of gold Set with beryl; His abdomen is carved ivory Inlaid with sapphires.

esv.text: His arms are rods of gold, set with jewels. His body is polished ivory, bedecked with sapphires.

cnv.text: 他的雙手像金管， 鑲嵌著水蒼玉； 他的軀體如象牙塊， 周圍包著藍寶石。

ccb.text: 他的双臂如同镶着水苍玉的金杖， 身体如同镶嵌蓝宝石的象牙。
